channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Latest on U.S.-Iran Peace Deal Process as Trump, Tehran Provide Details
item.description: Progress appears to be made in U.S.-Iran talks, though a peace deal may still take time. CBS News' Aaron MacLean reports.

item.title: California chemical leak no longer poses immediate explosion risk, officials say
item.description: Authorities stated that the threat of a major explosion from a chemical leak in Orange County has been removed for now. CBS News Los Angeles' Tina ...

item.title: Iran updates: Trump honors fallen troops in Memorial Day speech amid conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Iran acknowledges obstacles but sees potential deal with U.S. taking shape
item.description: While the Trump administration expresses optimism about a possible agreement, Iran notes lingering hurdles and says frequent U.S. position changes are unhelpful.
